Usage:
  circleci runner open [flags]

Examples:
# Open runners for the org inferred from git remote
$ circleci runner open

# Open runners for a specific organization
$ circleci runner open --org gh/myorg

# Open when your remote is on CircleCI server
$ circleci runner open --host https://circleci.example.com


Flags:
      --org string   Organization slug (e.g. gh/myorg); defaults to git remote

Global Flags:
  -c, --config string   path to config file (default: ~/.config/circleci/config.yml)
      --debug           enable debug logging
  -q, --quiet           suppress informational output; data on stdout is unaffected
